subject_overlap: Confirmed: public GEO sample titles share CNTO1275CRD3002 subject identifiers; streamed series-matrix check found 115 overlapping unique IDs.
sample_overlap: No exact same sample/specimen indicated: DS047 is terminal ileum across week 0/week 8/week 44 plus controls; DS107 is rectum biopsy week 0 plus controls. Same subjects can contribute different tissue/timepoint arrays.
recommended_overlap_notes: UNITI/ustekinumab Crohn family row. DS047/GSE112366 and DS107/GSE207022 both use GPL13158 and CNTO1275CRD3002 UNITI-2 identifiers; 115 public subject IDs overlap in series-matrix sample titles. Do not count DS047 and DS107 as fully independent cohorts. Samples are not exact duplicates because DS047 profiles terminal ileum at multiple trial timepoints and DS107 profiles week-0 rectum biopsies.
